name: AtlasLineageInfo
description: Lineage graph information for an entity showing upstream and downstream data flow.

baseEntityGuid.description: GUID of the entity whose lineage is being retrieved.

lineageDepth.description: Number of hops traversed in the lineage graph.

guidEntityMap.description: Map of GUID to entity header for all entities in the lineage graph.

relations.description: List of lineage relationships between entities.
